allow: PowerShell($conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5173 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conn\) { $conn | Select-Object -Unique -ExpandProperty OwningProcess | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "killed pid $_" } } else { "no vite on 5173" })

Bash(node -e "const p=require\('./package.json'\); const d={...p.dependencies,...p.devDependencies}; console.log\('canvas:',d.canvas||'no'\); console.log\('playwright:',d.playwright||d['@playwright/test']||'no'\); console.log\('puppeteer:',d.puppeteer||'no'\); console.log\('vitest:',d.vitest||'no'\); console.log\('jest:',d.jest||'no'\);")
